title: USER II Treatment of Ancient DNA Extracts
author: Alba Rey-Iglesia
materials: In a PCR tube, add 4.8 µL Thermolabile USER II Enzyme - 250 units New England Biolabs Catalog #M5508L to 27.2 µL DNA extract, for a final reaction volume of 32 µL.
In a thermocycler, incubate the reaction for 3 hours at 37°C then cool down to 10ºC. Can be left overnight at 10ºC.

steps.title: Clean up using Monarch DNA Cleanup...
steps.instruction: Clean up using Monarch DNA Cleanup Columns (5ug) - 100 columns New England Biolabs Catalog #T1034L Do not touch the film of the spin column when adding liquids. Pay attention when adding small volume of liquid. Make sure the liquid do not attach on the wall. As of 31 December 2024 the "Monarch DNA Cleanup Columns (5ug) New England Biolabs Catalog #T1024L" have been discontinued and replaced by "Monarch Spin Columns S1A and Tubes New England Biolabs Catalog #T2037L".

steps.title: Add 450 µl modified Buffer PB to the spin column
steps.instruction: Add 450 µl modified Buffer PB to the spin column.

steps.title: Add 650 µl Buffer PE Qiagen...
steps.instruction: Add 650 µl Buffer PE Qiagen Catalog #19065 to the spin column.

steps.title: Centrifuge at max speed for 1...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at max speed for 1 min to dry the column.

steps.title: Place the spin column in a fresh 1
steps.instruction: Place the spin column in a fresh 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube. Use 1.5 mL LoBind tubes Eppendorf Catalog #022431021 , if available, but if not available, then use EBT buffer instead of EB buffer for the final elution (Step 4.8).

steps.title: Add 20 µL Buffer EB Qiagen...
steps.instruction: Add 20 µL Buffer EB Qiagen Catalog #19086 to the spin column. If not using LoBind tubes, add 20 uL EBT buffer instead.

steps.title: Optional
steps.instruction: Optional: Or add 2.4 µL USER II enzyme to 13.6 µL DNA extract, for a final reaction volume of 16 µL, if you want to keep some of the DNA extract as untreated.

steps.title: Add the entire USER II-DNA reaction...
steps.instruction: Add the entire USER II-DNA reaction (32 or 16 µL) and mix by pipetting or inversion.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 8,000 RPM in a...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 8,000 RPM in a benchtop centrifuge for 1 min, discard flow through.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 8,000 RPM for 1 min, discard flow through
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 8,000 RPM for 1 min, discard flow through.

steps.title: Incubate for 5 mins at room...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 5 mins at room temperature to allow the DNA to elute from the column and dissolve in the buffer.

steps.title: Centrifuge at max speed for 1 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at max speed for 1 min.

steps.title: Discard the spin column and store...
steps.instruction: Discard the spin column and store the eluted DNA at -20ºC.

steps.title: See following protocol for buffer preparation protocols
steps.instruction: See following protocol for buffer preparation protocols. Ancient DNA Extraction from Bones and Teeth by Vanssy Li Required buffers for this protocol: Buffer PE Modified Buffer PB Buffer EB - if using LoBind tubes Buffer EBT - if not using LoBind tubes (Buffer EB + Tween-20)
